name: llm-git-commit-vscode-extensions
description: Generate Git commit messages from staged changes in VS Code.

commands.title: LLM Git Commit: Generate Commit Message

llmGitCommit.model.description: The model name used to generate commit messages.

llmGitCommit.apiBaseUrl.description: The OpenAI-compatible API Base URL, for example https://api.openai.com/v1. The extension calls /chat/completions.

llmGitCommit.apiKey.description: The OpenAI-compatible API key. It is stored in plain text in your local VS Code settings.json; never commit or share that file.

enumDescriptions: Use Conventional Commits, for example feat: add commit generator.
Use a concise plain-language commit message.
llmGitCommit.commitStyle.description: The format of generated commit messages.

llmGitCommit.language.description: The language of generated commit messages.

llmGitCommit.customPrompt.description: Additional instructions for generating commit messages. Supports multiple lines and Markdown as plain text. For example, require a scope, an issue number, or a specific tone.

scripts.package:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run package
scripts.package:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run package
